task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Back Office using the provided PIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or menu is visible, indicating successful login with PIN 1111.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Shift configuration or management window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or dialog titled 'Shift', 'Shifts', or 'Shift Explorer' is open on the screen within the Floreant POS application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct shift name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Early Bird' is visible in the Name field of the Shift creation or edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the shift start time to 05:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time field shows '05:00', '5:00 AM', or equivalent in the Shift dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the shift end time to 10:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end time field shows '10:00', '10:00 AM', or equivalent in the Shift dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the newly created shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' or 'OK' button in the Shift dialog, or the 'Early Bird' shift is subsequently visible in the list of existing shifts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to create the shift.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the Floreant POS menus and dialogs, rather than using a terminal to execute SQL commands directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the appearance of Floreant POS (a Java Swing UI), not a text editor, script file, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database via command line.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing Apache Derby interactive SQL tools (like 'ij') or direct 'INSERT INTO SHIFT' commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses Floreant POS 1.4. The agent must log into the Back Office using PIN '1111'. The agent must create a shift with the exact name 'Early Bird', start time '05:00' (or 5:00 AM), and end time '10:00' (or 10:00 AM). The VLM should verify these exact values are entered into the Floreant POS GUI.
